title: Sweet Piccalilli Bake
description: A sweet and tangy piccalilli bake perfect for a vegetarian snack or side dish.
instructions: Peel and slice the sweet potatoes into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
In a mixing bowl, combine the piccalilli and bake beans.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange a layer of sweet potato slices.
Spread half of the piccalilli-bean mixture over the sweet potatoes.
Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of sweet potatoes.
Drizzle with vegetable oil and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 30 minutes then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes.
